review_text: Fantastic place for a family getaway! The units are modern, the park amenities are fantastic and the location is great to see both Anglesea but to travel a little further too along The Great Ocean Road! One of our fav Big 4s!

My family and I recently had a one night stay at BIG4 Anglesea Holiday Park and one night wasn't enough. We had a wonderful time. We have two small children and they LOVED everything the park had to offer. The pool, animal statues, real animals (lots of hungry cockatoos and even a kangaroo) the playground and games room.
The staff were all very helpful and friendly. We felt very welcome and all the facilities were clean and well equipped for what we needed. It's also a nice size so nothing is too out of the way which with two small kids was a huge win. The only negative was the waterslide was kids only, no adults which broke my heart just a tiny bit. Highly recommend!
Very helpful and cheaper than the next two sites on big 4.

We have stayed at 50+ holiday parks around Australia and this is one of the best run family parks.

The facilities are so well done with the very large indoor heated pool, playgrounds, jumping pillows, games rooms and common areas. The staff are lovely and the location is a 5 ish minute walk to town.

If you have a family, this is your place to stay in Angelsea, it felt so safe and clean, food trucks daily (sometimes morning and night) and also some shows for the kids like science and magic.

The resident kangaroo was also cool!
Well equipped chalet. nice location and set up. very quiet. my grand daughter enjoyed the indoor heated swimming pool.
Great location and wonderful facilities!

We had a fantastic stay at BIG4 Anglesea! The location was perfect—close to the beach and shops, which made everything so convenient. Our cabin was immaculate, well-equipped, and had everything we needed. We loved seeing kangaroos and cockatoos around—it was such a delight for our daughter.

The facilities were excellent: the jumping pillow was a huge hit, and the indoor heated pool was perfect. The customer service at the reception desk was fantastic—friendly, helpful, and always ready to assist. We’ve already been raving about BIG4 Anglesea to our family and friends, and we can’t wait to come back. Overall, just a fantastic park!
Great place to get away with kids my kids were entertained the whole time would be going back
Great spot, very clean and modern. Location was good

Sehr schöner Campground.
Wir hatten einen sehr schönen Stellplatz für unseren Camper. Alle Wege zu den Einrichtungen sind für uns gut und in kurzer Zeit erreichbar. Es gibt sogar einzelne Familienbadräume.
Jedoch die Desinfektion des Wasser riecht fürchterlich.
Der Pool ist eingebaut und Smartphone frei!
Der Weg zum Supermarkt ist nur ca. 1.3Km kurz.

Very cramped campsite. We had a rv we couldn't even put up our awning due to no space  couldn't sit outside no space. We were like rabbits in cages. Children running around unsupervised everywhere.  So if you want to be like a rabbit and love Children it's the place for you.  Money grading Big4 foes it again. Well done big4. Never again.

We had an amazing stay at BIG4 Anglesea Holiday Park — honestly one of the best holiday parks we’ve visited. From the moment we arrived, everything just clicked. The park is immaculately clean, beautifully maintained, and has so many family-friendly facilities that kept everyone happy.

The kids couldn’t get enough of the indoor pool with slides and the playgrounds, and even the youngest had a blast in the toddler areas.
The cabins were spacious, modern and well-equipped  exactly what you want for a hassle-free stay.

Staff were friendly and welcoming, and the overall vibe of the park was safe, relaxed, and perfect for families. Great location close to the beach and shops too.

Would absolutely recommend BIG4 Anglesea for your next family holiday
we’re already planning our return! 🌟🌞🌊

Disgusting business practices and customer service. We were booked to stay at BIG4 Anglesea from 9–11 January. On the day of arrival, much of Victoria was under Catastrophic or Extreme fire danger, with emergency services advising essential travel only.
We contacted the park to discuss rescheduling or holding our deposit as credit, as we still wished to stay at a later date. Unfortunately, there was no understanding, empathy or consideration for the current circumstances. We were told it was our choice not to attend and that we would forfeit our deposit if we didn’t arrive.
Given the serious fire conditions and family evacuations on the same day, travelling was neither safe nor responsible. We’ve previously had positive experiences with this BIG4 park, which made this lack of care and flexibility extremely disappointing. Goes to show how much they actually care.

Like another 5 star review I hadn’t planned on leaving feedback but customer service here is above & beyond. Wild weather left our set up broken while we’d been away staff attempted to fix. Jess (incredible service) organised for us to stay in an available cabin. Highly recommend booking here, amenities clean, plenty for kids to do with easy access to beach & shopping.

This place is excellent for families

Location is excellent and close to shops and beach

The facilities are fantastic with a indoor pool, play ground, games room

During the Christmas new years break we had food trucks and entertainment for kids almost daily

Staff and friendly and helpful

Highly recommend
Quite far from the beach. Safari tent well equipped but parking lot was horrible, not paved and plants not well trimmed. Lots of insects and bird droppings

I wasn’t planning to leave a review until after our stay, but this place deserves one while we’re still here. 🫶
From booking to check-in and throughout our stay, everything has been seamless. The friendly staff have been incredibly helpful, the location is unbeatable, and the facilities are amazing. This has been a family holiday we will never forget. We will definitely be back! 💖

Absolute legends Jess was extremely accommodating as was the other lady the following morning who made me a coffee on the house after watching me have a hard time with my kids the following morning. On our last day our car wouldn't start and the maintenance guy worked on it for 2hrs to help us get on the road. They let us stay in the room in the air-conditioning (as it was a very hot day) after check out time. Free of charge. Thank you all for your kindness if I could give you more stars I would. The amenities are fantastic and the staff where helpful with things to do. As a mum taking her 3 kids on an impromptu holiday with 3 kids under 10 we couldn't have asked for a better experience. So  much fun was had and their kindness filled our souls. Thank you so much. Legends Thank you ! We will be back the kids have said they want to do this every year.
Great safari tents, 3rd time here. Very relaxing & great pool for kids

Very nicely made campground.
Clean and spacious facilities.
Good location.
We had a nice stay here.

Big 4 anglesea.  My husband and I stayed in a 2 bedroom cabin. Great place to stay. Cleaning and maintenance were outstanding.  Surrounded by beautiful well kept gardens. The beds were fabulous. Couch was lovely and comfortable. Great kitchen. Couldn't fault this place. Absolutely loved it.
Had a wonderful experience staying here and would recommend it to everyone thinking of coming through

We loved the park and couldn’t complain about anything. The toilet block was the cleanest I’ve seen and the lay out was great - individual rooms with a toilet or toilet, basin and shower (rather than just a few cubicles in one building). The park and indoor pool were a massive hit with the kids 3-10. The powered sites were on astroturf so it stopped the camp site becoming muddy on a very rainy day. 10/10 would go again.
It was that best big four holiday park with indoor pool and very cozy environment

We recently stayed at BIG4 Anglesea Holiday Park in one of the Safari Tents and it was such a lovely experience! The environment is perfect for families and friends to gather. The warm indoor swimming pool and the jumping pillow were definitely highlights for the kids.

The Safari Tent itself was comfortable — the main bed with the heater kept us warm, but the bunk beds for the kids were freezing at midnight (the aircon heater didn’t seem to help much, haha). Still, it was all part of the fun and adventure.

The grounds are beautifully maintained, the playground is fantastic, and the pool exceeded our expectations. On top of that, we even had wild parrots — and a big kangaroo — appear right in front of us!

Overall, a very good experience. We’d recommend it for families looking for a fun and unique stay close to nature.
Wonderful for kids. During school holidays, they had science show and magic show. Food trucks comes for the dinner time.
We had nice stay heated swimming pool plenty of parking. We booked 3 bedrooms cabin it was perfect. Good playground for the kids.

Thank you for a fabulous stay, we will definitely be back. The grounds are so well maintained, the playground is superb and the pool exceeded what we expected. The kids always found someone to play with and it was great to see so many kids riding their bikes around. Our van site was excellent. I loved the amenities block set up, best I’ve seen.
Thank you!!!

We had the best weekend staying here.
They have thought of everything .
Probably the nicest cabins I've ever slept in .
Kids had a blast.
Staff are lovely also
We cannot wait till our next stay.

Wonderful park, especially for kids in winter. Indoor pool was amazing, pity the changing rooms weren't heated. One star off for location, as it's not really within walking distance to the beach with kids. Friendly wildlife was also a hit!

Would go back again and again.

My family an I stayed in our caravan here, upon arrival we were quick to realise I had made a stuff up booking us in for the size van we had however the lady at reception didn’t hesitate to find us an alternative that fit our van. The place itself is very well positioned and thought out.

I stayed in a cabin for 4 nights with my kids, it was fantastic. Cold days/nights and the swimming pool was perfectly warm and surprisingly large, the slide was a favourite .
Big play ground with the jumping pillow and huge sandpit.
The landscaping around the park was spot on, well manicured and every where clean all the time.
Riding bikes around the park was good as well, up and down the “hill” (not steep) was fun and the rest of the activities were well done.
Food vans on occasion visited the park so you could get dinner from them if that’s what you wanted.
Very close to everything in town, a short drive or comfortable walk.
I loved it, the kids loved it and we’ll return at some point soon!!
Thanks to all the staff who helped out throughout our stay.

That's our first time visiting Big4 Anglesea Holiday Park. We ( 4 Adults + 2 kids) are Big4 + Perk members too. The owner so nice as I asked them we are able to enjoy the current offer, which is $400 instead of $450 as we booked very early. Appreciate that they gave us the offer! What LEGEND!

We arrived on time and checked in with Karen at the reception, where you'll receive a nice and warm welcome. She gave me the map and showed me the bike trail as a safe way to ride with your little 1. We love the bike trail, easy and pretty fun for the kids along the ride. You will see the magnificent playground next to the river, and you can also ride to the seaside. (It can take a day for the ride if you go with the little one.)

Winter traveller - Glamping @ The Safari Tent (Elephant statue), the tent is quite spacious and provides a heater and aircon. Pretty well and quite powerful for the heater. You may need to bring a portable heater and extension wire if you need a warmer to sleep in the sofa bed or for movie night ( you have to bring along your projector and project on the tent). There is no TV as a camping idea.)

They do have towels x 4, face towel x 2, hairdryer, extra blanket x 2, toilet paper and tissue box. BBQ at the patio, microwave, mini fridge, tea, sugar, coffee & chocolate powder drink. My girls love the hot chocolate and request few times from Karen. They love Karen (LOL). I had a hot bath at the patio, reading and watching a movie. That's my 1st bath of the year during the trip.

* Things you might need to bring for basic cooking:
sauce pot, frying pan, portable gas stove, peeler, salad bowl, spatula, and a drainer. BBQ provided a tong and BBQ utensils.

The little cute cubby double-deck bed and the Hot Pool with slide are iconic for the girls. No JOKE !! the kids hardly to getting out of the pool. They spend about 2.5 hrs in the heated pool, jumping pillow, pirate ship and the sand pit. We had a great time and definitely will go back with a group of friends.

Overall, the public toilet, game room, and camp kitchen at the holiday park well well-maintained and clean!! BRAVO !!

Suggestions:
Add on for the Glamping tent - Pots, frying pan, peeler, salad bowl, and A basic bathroom organiser hanging on the shower head.
We need a fire PIT, my girls were looking forward the roasting marshmallows for this trip. Finally, we did it on the portable stove.haha
We really enjoyed the amenities at this park. Kids had a ball, the indoor pool and playground were a hit. Close to town and not far from the beach. Check in service was friendly :)

My family recently stayed for 2 nights. We were very happy with the 2bedroom cabin. Clean, modern and basic necessities like dishwashing liquid, coffee and tea for two serves (which is fine as we always planned to IGA for supplies). Kids were delighted with a small table and chairs just for them. Deck was secure with gate. Great shower pressure too.
We woke the first morning to two kangaroos in front of our cabin which was very exciting for my boys.
I would have loved that the playground would be open earlier than 9am as my kids wake at 5am. The countdown till 9am is very long.
Playground is great, jumping pillow was a great hit. Facilities and grounds are well kept and clean. The camp toilets and showers were very clean. Love the reception have coffee from 8am.
Location is good. Quick drive to beach and shops.
The place has a good feel about, good energy, friendly people, very family orientated, loved the daily visits from cockatoos, galahs and kangaroos.
Reception staff were beyond helpful and friendly.
We asked about a late check-out, 11:30am was for free but we paid an extra $40 to do a 4pm checkout. It was well worth it.
My husband and I keep saying what a great weekend it was.
Great park for the kids
Great park!! We love going there, the heated pool, great playground and the 3 bedroom cabin was very spacious and modern, well done!
Everything was perfect

We are from frankston. We wanted something for the family mid way between frankston and the 12 apostles. Found anglesea big 4 park which seems to tick all our boxes: close to fishing spots, close to beaches , playground, jumping pillow, indoor heated pool, 3 bedroom cabin as we were 7 - 4 adults/1 teenager/ 2 kids of 7 years old. Anglesea big 4 park really didn’t disappoint : the facility was clean, beddings and towels were clean, the kitchen had everything we needed. It had everything it said it would have and the kids/ all of us loved it. They had even 3 icy poles waiting for the kids in the freezer! The staff were also very friendly.  I give them 5 stars and definitely recommend!!!
Loved it, great to get away to the beach
Well situated but very very outdated.

Pool and playground very good.|Amenities in unit poor |No toiletries , tissues or bath mat |Towels thin |Carpet filthy |Note on fridge there was a surprise in freezer for kids but empty |Waited over 2 hours for high chair and cot despite asking for them on booking, then on arrival and when we unpacked.|And $460 per night for 3 bedroom unit

The best camping we ever been ⛺️ everything was perfect. Enough toilets and showers and they where so clean always. So beautiful installation, we felt so comfy. The lady at the reception was also so nice and helpful. They have a foodtruck coming one Saturday with delicious artisanal pizzas. And on Sunday they had a reptile show where you can see a lot of animals and even touch them. Also a really  nice lady that works by her own. The beach is on a 10 minutes walk and I loved the beach. Also the supermarket is at a 15 minutes walk away. They have plenty onf place for childrens (also a indoor pool). We stayed 3 nights and it was just perfect!  Thanks ☺️☺️

Cannot fault this park and as much as the price for a caravan site is on the high side, you get what you pay for. ||Great site, lovely and incredibly helpful staff, immaculate facilities and close to the cafe, river and beach.   ||There are a lot of accommodation options and it all blends in beautifully with the gardens
Stayed here for 4 nights and the plave is fantastic, great pool and park for the kids, the staff were so accomadating, we will definitely be back

What a beautiful place to stay.
Staff were lovely,  facilities were perfect,  wildlife was spectacular.
Cabin was beautiful.  We honestly had the best time here and will absolutely be back.
No tv, internet and we told the park this nothing done. Borrow a dvd? No. Boring as, expensive for what it is. For a 2 year old it’s not worth it  pool was the best part

Freindly staff. Well maintained surrounds. Great location.  Wildlife right at the door!  Only negative was the tv reception in the bedroom...though we didn't have any problems during previous stays. This has been our go to park for summer vacations for 10+ years.

אחד מהביג 4 הכי טובים שהיינו בהם.
הבריכה מחוממת ונעימה, הכל נקי ומסודר.
הצוות שירותי ומקסים.
נהנינו מאוד

An fantastic and very family friendly camp ground - don't think twice if you are looking to getaway with your kids for a camping trip.

This camp ground is located within a short drive to multiple beaches along the Great Ocean Road.

The camp ground itself has a huge list of amenities including heated pools, games room with a table tennis table and some arcade games, toddler room with toys, sandpits, a terrific playground and plenty more to keep the kids entertained.

We stayed on sites 52, 53, 54 which is right next to the playground. The powered sites are half turf and half grass and you can safely peg your tents on the fake surface.

The toilets and showers are in individual rooms and immaculately maintained but so is the entire campgeound.

Highly recommended this Big4 in Anglesea which is also close to the shops.
My kids loved this Big 4, they especially enjoyed the pool, jumping pillow and playgrounds. They haven’t stopped asking to go back! I recommend this Big 4.
Stayed in a 2-bedroom cabin. Fantastic holiday park with great amenities. Very clean. Front desk staff were very nice. Would definitely return!

Our only disappointment was the Pool because, as much as it has a waterslide and waterfall, the pool ranges from 1.2-2m and only a very restricted area where my 8yr could stand, even my 12yr & 10yr couldn’t do much except go down the slide.

Clean room and great amenities.
Kids loved the pool and jumping pillow.
Friendly staff and you can even buy coffee from the reception area.

Sehr schöne Anlage, sehr gepflegt und sauber. Wir hatten einen tollen, grossen Platz. Nettes und hilfsbereites Personal. Die WC-Anlagen waren zwar von der Anzahl her etwas begrenzt aber dafür sehr schön und es war praktisch ein ganzes Bad für sich zu haben.

My family stayed for 7 nights/8 days in a 3-bedroom apartment. We initially only wanted to stay for 4 nights but the booking wouldn’t allow us to do so due to the time of year being Christmas Eve, so our only option was to not book at all or stay until New Years Eve (so it cost us a lot more than what we think it was worth). To be honest after staying at a few different BIG4 locations, I think Anglesea was a tad overrated. Whilst the staff were nice and polite and amenities were ok, there wasn’t really much to do besides the swimming pool for our kids who are 6, 8 and 10. There’s a jumping pillow and small playground but there’s only so many times a kid can climb the same thing before getting bored. There was no basketball or tennis courts, nor go-karts or bikes to hire (luckily we brought our own). The games room only had a ping pong table (which you had to pay $1 for the ball to use) otherwise you’re paying $2 for an arcade game that lasts 45secs when the goal of getting away is to get the kids outside. In terms of location, Anglesea is a nice little town but there’s not much around. We had to drive 20mins to Torquay to get a large amount of groceries from Coles, Woolies and Aldi, otherwise the IGA would have cost us a fortune for a family of 5 to eat for a week. For a 3 day stay BIG4 Anglesea would have been okay but for anything longer I don’t think it had enough to entertain the children.
We recently stayed in a cabin which ticked all the boxes. We did have an issue with the shower head but it was fixed right away. The facilities were great and the kids had a ball.

I recently stayed at Big4 Anglesea, and unfortunately, it didn't live up to expectations. The atmosphere was a bit boring, with limited things to do, and the facilities only opened at 9 am, which is late when you have kids. The activity room was disappointing – it was dirty and lacked any activities besides a TV and broken toys for children under 3, which were also dangerous. Additionally, despite pre-arranged requests and confirmation at the time of booking to stay in adjacent rooms with friends, the staff failed to follow through. We were given rooms further away, even though we were assured the arrangement was confirmed and then provided with room numbers. On check-in, we were dismissed by staff and spoken over and interrupted.
Overall, it was a letdown.

We are writing to formally express our deep dissatisfaction with our recent stay at Big 4 Anglesea, which fell significantly short of expectations due to a failure to honor commitments made at the time of booking.

When we booked our accommodation in July 2024, we were assured over the phone that our suites would be 104 and 105, as we were traveling with another family and specifically requested adjoining suites. We were further informed that, in the event that someone else wanted to book one of these suites, reception would contact us to provide the option to secure the suite by paying an additional fee.

At no point during the following months were we contacted by your team regarding any change to this arrangement. Based on this, we had every expectation that the agreement made at the time of booking would be honored.

Upon arriving on January 2, 2025, we were shocked and disappointed to learn that only one of the originally promised suites was available. Instead, our family was allocated Suite 113, which was not adjacent to our friends' accommodation. When I, Chloe, raised this issue with the staff member at the front desk and reiterated the assurances given to us during the booking process, I was met with an unprofessional and dismissive response. The staff member claimed that the information I was given over the phone was incorrect and stated that your venue does not offer such guarantees.

I attempted to explain our situation and the impact this had on our planned holiday, but I was repeatedly interrupted and spoken over. When I requested to speak with management, I was told that no one would be available until Monday, January 5, 2025. Despite waiting on Monday for a resolution, no one from management contacted us as promised. Given the circumstances and the lack of any attempt to rectify the situation, we decided to leave at 5 p.m. on Monday, foregoing the final night we had already paid for.

This experience was extremely disappointing, especially for first-time visitors. The failure to honor our booking, the dismissive and unprofessional attitude of your staff, and the lack of any follow-up or resolution from management were unacceptable, particularly during a peak holiday period when we expected a higher standard of service.

As a result, our entire holiday was negatively impacted, and we no longer have any confidence in your venue’s ability to meet customer expectations or fulfill its commitments. We are seeking acknowledgment of this issue and a response detailing how you intend to address this matter to prevent similar experiences for future guests.

We regret to say that, based on this experience, we cannot recommend Big 4 Anglesea to others and will not be returning in the future.

Yours sincerely,
Chloe
Amazing stay at BIG4 Anglesea Holiday Park! The facilities were spotless, the staff were friendly, and the location was perfect for exploring the Great Ocean Road. Highly recommend for families!

We stayed here for 4 nights and overall was a pleasant stay - the kids were entertained so that was the important thing. Not sure we would return as we've enjoyed other Big 4s more.

+ves
Friendly service
Indoor heated pool
Jumping pillow & playground area
Giant chess
Units were well spaced from each other
Good self contained kitchen and decent size fridge

-ves
Dated bathroom/shower (step in tub to shower & showerhead needs an upgrade).
Bedding was clean but too soft for our preference - didn't get a great sleep.
Limited supplies for stay meaning had to walk to reception to request for extra coffee / dishwashing tablets / bin liners.
DVD player/discs didn't work - we tried 4 of them.
Games room ate our tokens.
Noisy neighbours throughout the night (night management not present to enforce 10pm quiet time rule), guests shouldn't have to request this.

Reasonable stay if you want some downtime as there's not so many activities to do within close proximity.

An absolutely beautiful park with amazing staff. Jess made us feel welcomed and at home, as she has the many other times we have stayed at the park. The facilities are always in perfect condition and unlike any other parks in the area. We will be staying here for years to come.

Absolutely loved our 2 night stay in the Safari tent. It was super comfy and luxurious. Loved the amenities inside the room, especially the number of power points everywhere. It was a great first Glamping experience. My kids loved it. It was super spacious as well which is great with young kids. The split system in the room was definitely needed for the cooler nights and the aircon for the warm day. Only negative was the bathtub having no privacy so we weren’t able to use it. A curtain of some sort would have been great. It was still a cute feature for the safari tent. The park itself was also amazing. We used a lot of the facilities, like the pool, activity room and playground. We checked out and headed to the beach after our stay and we were still able to come back and use the site facilities like the shower which was so helpful before our drive back to Melbourne. Staff were lovely. The whole park was very clean and well set up. The location is also great in terms of getting around in the area. Definitely would stay again.

What a fantastic Big4. Everything you need for you and your kids in the one place. We stayed four nights and had no reason to leave the holiday park. The heated indoor pool was a favourite with its own splash park and baby pool. Plus the 0.8mt deep pool connected to the large pool made it fun and safe for my small kids to go in without having any real swimming abilities. The jumping pillow of course a highlight but the big playground with plenty to do kept everyone entertained for days. The toddler area was incredible for younger kids, my 3 year old could’ve sat there all day playing.
Safari tent really made this holiday a destination for us, glamping in a big safari tent but still having everything we needed at arms length was incredible with the kids. Having our own mini bbq and fridge, plus comforts like a shower made this camping experience really adventurous but easy as a solo parent with 3 young kids! We can’t wait to return again very soon!

Absolutely dreamy.  From the first time you pull in through the gates the landscape and entrance was so beautiful and pristine.  The lobby is amazing and warm the staff are absolutely attentive, polite, helpful and kind and that filters right down to the grounds people and the cleaners.
We stayed in a Safari tent and OMG it was everything and more.  The little kitchen has a small fridge and cutlery and cleaning products supplied even insect spray which I did not see and went and brought more.
The room is spacious it was perfect for myself and my 2 kids.
Its has bunks which the kids loved and a queen bed and couch and lounge table.
Cooking appliances are a kettle and toaster and a mini Webber on the deck.
There is also a claw bath on the deck and we used that everyday.
The playground is insane for kids of all ages it also has an indoor heated pool with a water slide and a baby pool and little toddler pool.
The games room also has a toddler baby room equipped with all toddler and baby toys adjoining is a TV room and couches you can get dvd from the the reception and then adjoining to that is a games room.
If your camping or have a caravan they have the best toilets and bathrooms and kitchen area for meals.  They also have bbq’s scattered throughout the park with picnic benches for use.
This place is brilliant and centrally located within Anglesea.
We will definitely be back!
Thanks for having us.

We stayed in a safari tent. Overall, nice facilities, great location. Best thing is the heated indoor pool; good for hot or cold weather. The playground was fun although a little run-down in parts (ropes broken) but also had a great jumping pillow. We spent hours in the pool and park! Also has a great little coffee spot. Overall a great park!

The most cleanest Big 4 I've ever stayed in out off the other 10 places. The cabins are very modern and very comfortable.|Kids enjoyed the facilities there, spent the whole days swimming.|Can't wait to book again next holidays. Plus coffee is great!
Awesome park!!! Very modern and clean loved our stay thanks guys!
The second time here and I will be definitely coming back The family love's it

Great big 4 in Anglesea. We stayed in a 3br house, cosy but perfect for our stay. The complex is well maintained and facilities are perfect for young families with big playgrounds and indoor heated pools. It's also safe and generally family friendly. One issue- wifi is really poor, hardly works, very unreliable.

We absolutely loved our experience at this place! We decided to rent the tent room, which offered a fantastic glamping vibe that was perfect for our family. We really appreciated having our own bathroom, which combined the conveniences of home with the unique charm of a tent. The accommodations were spacious and comfortable, making our stay quite enjoyable.

There was plenty of parking available, which made it easy for us to come and go as we pleased. The facility also features a wonderful swimming pool, perfect for cooling off on hot days, and a kids’ playground that kept our little ones entertained for hours. Overall, we highly recommend this place for a fun and memorable family getaway!
What a great place for kids

Ask the cleaning girl for extra towles was told that we had to pay a extra $5 dollers a towel if we wanted extra she was very rude and made to feel to feel really uncomfortable would not recommend coming here you get no help and just rude staff never had this happen before
Beautiful n comfortable

Couldn't be happier with Big4 Anglesea.
So spacious, modern and clean. The park is huge and so well maintained. The playground is incredible and the indoor swimming complex is even better. There is something for all ages in the activity room and the swimming pool area. The staff are also very lovely and accommodating. This would have to be our favourite big4 park we've ever stayed at and we've stayed at quite a few over the years. Will definitely be visiting this park regularly!
We had a lovely stay..well maintained facilities and Amazing safari tents

Cannot wait to come back again! |This park is great! 2nd time back as a family, and we love the amenities! The indoor pool is huge, and suitable for lots of people to all enjoy! Toilet facilities are great ~ and close to the caravan/camping areas. Park is within walking distance of cafe's & eateries.  Caravan / Camping area is compact ~ so you can see the kids from your site  without losing them!|Reception staff were lovely, and made a good coffee & hot chocolate in the morning! |If you do have a caravan though, sites are a tight fit, so make sure you are good at reversing, or do not have a large van. We booked the large site, and had plenty of room for our 17 foot van , awning and car. |Next trip already in the plans!

Weekend get away.
Stayed at safari tent ⛺️ for 2nights.
Clean and tidy facilities.
Close from Melbourne.
Heated indoor pool was awesome.
Large play ground and brand new jumping pillows.
My kid loved it ❤️
Worth to stay Big4 Anglesea

We loved this Big4 site. We had the 3 bedroom cabin, which was a perfect size for our family of 5. The kids enjoyed the playground, jumping pillow and the indoor pool. I loved how the pool had a slide, it was very popular amongst the children, plus my younger children were able to use the toddler pool while my 7 year old went down the slide. The indoor play area was also a hit when the weather was not the best.||The cockatoos were a delight, obviously looking for food!||The cabin was well stocked with plates and utensils. We didn't go to any restaurants, we cooked in the cabin and used the park's BBQ for the sausages.||Only a very short drive to the beach. We would love to come back again in the summertime

Der beste Park unserer 4-wöchigen Australienreise. Schwimmbad und die sehr sauber gehaltenen sanitären Anlagen sowie die Kängurus und anderen Tiere haben uns begeistert.
Einziger Makel; etwas grell beleuchtet.

Quite simply the best holiday park we’ve ever stayed at. The family who run the park are so lovely and greet you warmly upon arrival. The park is immaculately clean and has modern facilities. Evenings are so much fun - kids roam freely and safely through out the park and have lots to do. It is a great family environment. Weekends during school holidays were such a treat with live music and food trucks. We stayed in a safari glamping  tent which was a very special experience.
We have camped here with my toddler son. He loves all the children facilities in here. Toilet and shower rooms are always cleans. Warm swimming pool.
We loved staying here. Cleanest Park we have ever stayed in. Facilities are fantastic. Pool is unreal and really warm. We stayed in the safari tent and couldn't fault it. Thankyou. We will be back

Wonderful short stay from Melbourne.
We stayed in a safari tent with our two kids and it was really awesome. Pool, playground, holiday programme, facilities all great

We recently stayed overnight at BIG4 Anglesea. Upon arrival, we were greeted by the most friendliest staff ✅ our accommodation was well appointed and had most comfortable beds ✅
Location ✅ Well maintained park and great facilities for all guests.
Sue gave us great tips on where to eat and what to see all along the Great Ocean Road - this info was really appreciated.

Wir hatten eine powered Site gebucht für eine Nacht. Sie war gross und sauber. Der BIG4 bieten verschiedene Möglichkeiten für Aktivitäten besonders für Kinder. Es hat einen grossen Spielplatz, ein Luftkissen und ein kleines überdachtes Schwimmbad. Der Aufenthalt hier hat sich definitiv gelohnt. Die sanitären Anlagen waren sehr sauber. Von dort kann man in etwa 10 Minuten zum Strand laufen.

only issue no grab rails in bathroom
and very large step over bath approx 10in to get into shower.

Had a lovely long weekend at this pretty holiday park. The facilities were spotlessly clean and clean and well thought out. The pool was relaxing and very nice and again spotlessly clean. The whole park is very well planned out and there is even a giant chess set near to the reception  and cafe. Walks to the water are easy and its a good base for touring the great ocean road.  The glamping tents have cute life size wild animals outside which the kids loved.  Highly recommended. Would stay here again.

We have stayed at this lovely park many times, but today I made a call to see if it was possible to book a safari tent for one nights accommodation on the 23rd February to take a lovely 12 yr old boy who has special needs on a respite trip, to enjoy the park’s facilities and near by locations. Upon chatting with Jess, I was told “No we only do 2 night stays as a minimum” which was fine. I preceded to explain to her the situation and the needs of the accommodation only  to be cut off abruptly and told “No it’s a 2 night minimum”. I was so taken back I replied “no need to be so rude”.
Never before have I engaged with someone who is so rude and dismissive of a request.
I did make a call earlier in the week to be told to call back towards the end of the week to see if there was availability, and if there was, it would be up to the owners discretion if they would allow the one nights stay.
We have been travelling many years and are Big4 members, but now given the reception I have received, I would certainly reconsider staying at this park. It’s such a shame that a little boy who has special needs, can be denied of a getaway all due to someone’s ignorance and greed for a dollar. Sadly this little boy yet again is denied a good time!.
Fantastic holiday park, very helpfull staff , immaculate facility's, addition of a pool, the best big4 we have visited yet.. lots of wildlife too
Great park and facilities. Only wish it was closer to the beach (still walking distance but not idea when lugging the kitchen sink!)

En sehr ordentlich geführter Holiday Park, der zu unserer Besuchszeit (Melbourne Cup)  mit Familien gefüllt war. Trotz der zahlreichen lebhaften Kinder war unser zweitägiger Aufenthalt in der Cabin 34 sehr erholsam.  Die Ausstattung der großzügigen Unterkunft war qualitativ hochwertig und die Räume sehr sauber.
Beautiful and very relaxing place! Kids loved pool and jumping pillow!

All I can say is WOW
If you are looking for a family friendly place to stay in Anglesea don’t go anywhere else. Fish place is super clean and looks great the people who run it are super friendly there is so much for kids to do there playgrounds indoor swimming pool and activities room. This is the best caravan park I have been to so do yourself a favour and stay here for a few night and enjoy the area.

Excellent holiday park. Check in process was very smooth and the staff were very professional and knowledgeable. My only suggestion would be to service the bathrooms more often as they tended to get dirty very quickly.
Gorgeous, quiet, clean and tidy units.  Amazing amenities for kids to have fun and spend some time outside and away from the temptation of screens
Great for family
Perfect l9cation  great amenities, room decoration is so exciting...

Everything about this place was amazing! Call ahead and ask for a renovated unit! We stayed in a 2 bedroom unit that was recently renovated and it was fabulous.

Only downside about this place was the 1 ply toilet paper 😅😅

What a fantastic BIG4 holiday park. We stayed in the safari tent, and it was immaculate, well set-up and very spacious. The facilities and grounds are well maintained, and all staff we encountered were accommodating and friendly. We've thoroughly enjoyed our stay and definitely will be back.
We stay 2 nights and 3 days. It was out first time at this Big4. However, we have stayed at other big4. As always, it's a clean, safe, and family, kid friendly place.
great place

*UPDATED REVIEW*
The cabins have all been updated and fresh paint everywhere. The grounds are very well maintained. Lots of friendly people to talk to. Lots of baby/toddler friendly activities

We stayed for a long weekend with a large number of other families.  The park and cabin were very clean and tidy with good customer service.  The kids enjoyed the pool, playground and jumping pillow.  We used the camp kitchen a number of times and enjoyed being able to purchase a fresh morning coffee.  We immediately booked again for next year.
What a blast. We enjoyed this site so much we have booked again next year. Highly recommend

We stayed twice - had one great experience, one terrible experience. first time we stayed the power went out in the whole suburb and the owner went around and got free generous pizza orders for everyone who didn't have power to cook - including tents. Amazing and unexpected. Second time we stayed our camp site got ransacked and robbed 3 out of the 5 nights we were there, service desk 's response was 'its a camp site, thats what happens'. Big4's website states "At BIG4 our number one priority is the health and safety of our guests" so with that in mind - and as we camped with 2 little kids - it was a response to stop us coming back.
A great base for MTB, gravel rides, beach activities and running. Town is a 10 min walk and plenty for kids to do. Gets busy in peak season
We stayed in the safari tent, the mattress was firm (but we like it that way). Excellent facilities and tent condition (114).
Great location, awesome play area and pool for the kids and family, bbq area always  clean and great deals year round

Holiday park for the kids. They will love the pool, adventure playground and games room.

Thank you for a fantastic weekend.

Stayed in one of the African themed tents.
2 Adults and 4 kids.
Great fun and well equipped, as long as you dont mind not having a TV or enough coffee!!
There wasnt adequate bedding for the number booked so like camping, kinda had to inprovise.
Great bbq out under the verandah to use and outdoor bath definitely would be ised in the hotter months!
Great facilities, playground, pool and activities room for all ages of kids.
Our tent backed onto the main road so was very loud at night until the cars stopped.

The mattresses in the safari tent were too hard on both the double and single beds. There was a terrible smell in the tent we stayed in (130) like an animal had died inside or underneath the floor boards. Wouldn’t recommend. The price was expensive at $220 a night and it wasn’t good value for money. Choose a local hotel or air b n b instead. We cut our weekend short and left before check out. Our extended family who were with us had the same issues with the hard mattresses. These issues were reported to the receptionists who were very helpful but said that management take action only when customers complain directly to head office.
The family loved it and service was great
Awesome neat park

I recently booked a little getaway with family for Easter. I have previously stayed here for Business and just had to come back for the amentities. We stayed in a glamping tent which was awesome, since we love a BBQ and these all come with Webers. As we arrived, the cleaners were just finishing up our accomodation. We waited about 10 minutes and wandered the grounds as they finished up, but they were happy to accomodate free ice cream for the kids, and a complimentary wine and coffees for the adults which was unexpected and really lovely. The location is within close proximity to the beach and main shops (IGA, bakeries, cafes) for any top ups.
We had a great stay and I will be back to book a camping site next time.

Overall a great holiday, kids loved it especially the indoor pool & slide.
The only down point was the sad & miserable demeanor from staff.

We stayed for 7 days as my daughter was having intensive therapy.
I can't fault anything this park had everything we needed.The cabin was spacious and well equipped,warm and welcoming. We even went swimming in their heated pool It was winter and chilly. The staff were very helpful . The park is great for kids to plenty to do and large zoo animals at each tent.
Cant wait to go back !!

Stayed in one of the cabins for a few nights recently, and was very impressed with the cabin and park itself. With many different activities and such within the park. To the very helpful guide given to us to help make the most of Anglesea. Would definitely come back, and with the park having lots of different cabin themes, it will feel like a new experience over and over.
We paid $55 for 1 nights caravan site in off-season. Beautiful facilities. Walk to the beach & cafes.
